title: potentilla anglica var. humilis
intro: Potentilla anglica var. humilis, also known as low creeping cinquefoil, is a variety of flowering plant in the rose family. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids. The health benefits of Potentilla anglica var. humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health issues.
